list.title: Appointments
list.description: Review schedules, filter visits, and manage appointment status.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter appointments by date, doctor, patient, and status.

details.title: Appointment details
details.description: Review the selected appointment and its current status.
details.notFoundDescription: This appointment is no longer available.

form.editDescription: Update the schedule, notes, or status.
form.formDescription: Fill in the appointment details below.
form.lockedNotice: This appointment is already completed or cancelled, so rescheduling is disabled.
form.statusHint: New appointments are always created as Scheduled.

states.loadingOptionsDescription: Please wait while patients and doctors are loaded.
states.emptyDescription: Try a different filter or create a new appointment.
states.emptyDoctorsDescription: Create a doctor before scheduling appointments.
states.emptyPatientsDescription: Create a patient before scheduling appointments.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.errorDescription: We could not load appointment data.

errors.list: We could not load the appointments list.
errors.details: We could not load this appointment.
errors.save: We could not save the appointment.
errors.cancel: We could not cancel the appointment.
errors.doctors: We could not load doctor options.
errors.patients: We could not load patient options.
errors.today: We could not load today's appointments.
errors.conflict: This doctor already has an appointment at that time.

validation.future: Appointment date and time cannot be in the past.
validation.noChanges: There are no changes to save.

related.emptyDescription: Appointments will appear here once they are scheduled.

widget.title: Today's appointments
widget.description: Track visits that matter for the current workday.
